title: I Tried the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. The Bar for Foldables Has Been Raised
summary: The new name is necessary due to the lineup's addition of the Z Fold 8, a passport-shaped folding phone that sits between the Z Flip 7 and the Z Fold 8 Ultra.
